name: Mario Marcolongo Professional Evidence Interface
description: Agent-to-Agent discovery interface for Mario Marcolongo's evidence-bound professional dossier spanning AI safety, research and editorial operations, knowledge integrity, scientific verification, open science and data quality.

queryDossier.description: Retrieve the professional summary, work history, application positioning, skills and public evidence links.

queryMasterCv.description: Access the machine-readable master CV and comprehensive evidence record.

queryIntegrityRecord.description: Access public knowledge-integrity, provenance and investigation work samples.

skills.name: AI Safety & Model Behavior
skills.description: Self-directed adversarial testing across chat, image, agentic tool-use and indirect prompt-injection challenges, with evidence-bound reporting and explicit limitations.

skills.name: Research, Editorial & Community Operations
skills.description: Scientific editorial support, evidence-synthesis preparation, research facilitation, community-facing protocols, public writing and technical publishing operations.

skills.name: Knowledge Integrity, Trust & Investigations
skills.description: Source provenance, public-record research, cross-source corroboration, entity reconciliation, rights context and evidence-bound investigative reporting.

skills.name: Open Science & Data Quality
skills.description: Scientific verification, structured metadata, provenance workflows and public records across Wikimedia, Wikidata, FAIRsharing, Zenodo and ENA.

skills.name: Code-Literate Technical Operations
skills.description: Codebase reading and behavior inspection, requirements definition, functional testing, deployment operations and AI-assisted implementation workflows; not represented as independent software engineering.
